Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To May-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beth Chagonjian, via Zoom, for Julieanne Griffiths, aka Julie Anne Griffiths, Petitioner.

Counsel offers an update regarding the status of the immigration hearing and that it has been continued several times so that issue is at the same position as it was at the previous calling of this matter. The court advises that it is satisfied with counsel's due diligence.
The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-15-2008 is admitted to probate. Julieanne Griffiths, aka Julie Anne Griffiths is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-15-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Sarmiento. Not reported.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beth Chagonjian, via ZOOM, for Julieanne Griffiths, Petitioner.

The court expresses its concern regarding the inability to confirm Marieta's whereabouts especially with the impending immigration hearing. Counsel reports her concern that Marieta may no longer be alive. The court suggests continuing this matter until after the immigration hearing to determine whether Marieta appears at the hearing. The court instructs counsel to file a supplement regarding the immigration hearing one week prior to the next calling of this matter.

The Petition for Probate of Will, etc. is continued to Apr-27-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Continued To Feb-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beth Chagonjian for Julieanne Griffiths.

The court noted that the special letters expire today and that there is a request to renew them and extend special administration to February 16th. Ms. Chagonjian stated that her client received a call from the Philippine Consulate indicating that a family member of the decedent's putative spouse is concerned about her well-being and that they haven't seen or heard from her. Ms. Chagonjian also stated that they have been trying to find this individual and are having substantial obstacles, that they don't know if she is alive, that they have contacted every lead they have, that this is going to add another layer to the administration of this estate and that she is looking to the court to see if it can provide additional guidance with respect to what further actions she might take in order to determine whether or not the spouse is alive. The court stated that it is kind of tricky for it to give feedback on this issue, that due diligence issues are very fact intensive and case intensive, and raised the issue of Ms. Chagonjian producing something in writing with respect to the efforts they have made. Ms. Chagonjian stated that the information was provided to the court in the form of a declaration. The court stated that it will look at was has been filed and at the supplement. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The special letters are also extended to February 16, 2022 (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Continued To Jan-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Beth Chagonjian, via ZOOM, for Julieanne Griffiths, Administrator.

The court advises counsel that it intends to extend the special administration to Jan-05-2022 on the same terms and conditions set forth in the court's Nov-16-2021 order and that the clerk of the court will be authorized to re-issue letters of Special Administration to Julieanne Griffiths aka Julie Anne Griffiths. Counsel has no issue with the tentative ruling and the order is signed in open court.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to Jan-05-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
